shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse, bright classroom backdrop. Zhang Yutong warm welcoming return — natural confident greeting, teacher happy to see a returning student.
shots.speech_text: Welcome back. Lesson Two — numbers and time. You already know your tones, so now we are going to use them to count, tell time, and buy something.

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify yī through shí pronunciation and tone accuracy. Verify liù (6) and qī (7) are correctly toned.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong counting on fingers naturally, deliberate demonstration pace for each number, slight forward lean, clear articulation — patient and methodical.
shots.speech_text: One to ten. Yī, èr, sān, sì, wǔ — that is one through five. Liù, qī, bā, jiǔ, shí — six through ten. Say them with me. The tones are already in your study guide.
shots.on_screen:
一 二 三 四 五
yī èr sān sì wǔ

六 七 八 九 十
liù qī bā jiǔ shí

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify shíyī, shí'èr, èrshí, èrshísān pattern explanation is accurate.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong showing the pattern with a small gesture — explaining logic, slightly delighted that the pattern is simple.
shots.speech_text: Beyond ten is logical. Shíyī — ten one — is eleven. Shí'èr — ten two — is twelve. Èrshí — two ten — is twenty. Èrshísān — two ten three — twenty-three. The math is in the words.
shots.on_screen:
十一 shíyī = 11
十二 shí'èr = 12
二十 èrshí = 20
二十三 = 23

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Xiànzài jǐ diǎn?' and 'Sān diǎn zhōng' are natural and correctly toned.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong demonstrating asking the time question with natural gesture — perhaps glancing at wrist naturally, then saying the phrase, then giving an example answer.
shots.speech_text: Telling time uses your numbers. To ask: Xiànzài jǐ diǎn? — What time is it right now? To answer: Sān diǎn zhōng — three o'clock. Swap sān for any number you know.
shots.on_screen:
现在几点？
Xiànzài jǐ diǎn?
What time is it?

三点钟 Sān diǎn zhōng
Three o'clock

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Duōshao qián?' and 'Wǔ kuài' are natural and correctly toned. Kuài as informal unit is correct.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong in practical scenario energy — slightly amused and friendly, as if at a market stall, natural conversational expression.
shots.speech_text: Numbers at the market. Duōshao qián? — How much? That is your most useful question in China. The answer uses kuài — the everyday word for yuan. Wǔ kuài — five yuan. Shí kuài — ten yuan.
shots.on_screen:
多少钱？
Duōshao qián?
How much?

五块 · 十块
Wǔ kuài · Shí kuài

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong in encouraging practice mode — slight forward lean, brief natural pause between each phrase, inviting student to repeat.
shots.speech_text: Practice round. Say the number after me: sān, qī, shí, èrshí. Now the time: Xiànzài jǐ diǎn? And the price question: Duōshao qián? Perfect. Your study guide has more exercises.
shots.on_screen:
Practice:
sān · qī · shí · èrshí

Xiànzài jǐ diǎn?
Duōshao qián?

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong warm confident sign-off, natural genuine smile.
shots.speech_text: That is Lesson Two. You can count to one hundred, tell the time, and ask a price. Next lesson — the market. We are going to put all of this into a real conversation. Zàijiàn.
